title: Security Dashboard
subtitle: Security audit results, credential status, and extension permissions
liveAutoApprovalDesc: Live trading is using approvalMode "auto" — trades execute without any human confirmation.
liveAutoApprovalFix: Consider switching to approvalMode "confirm" or "manual" for live trading.
killSwitchTestDesc: Verify the kill switch works by running: tigerpaw trading kill && tigerpaw trading resume
killSwitchTestFix: Test the kill switch periodically to ensure it halts all trading activity.
